title: aloysia gratissima var. angustifolia
intro: Aloysia gratissima var. angustifolia, also known as Sweet everlasting or Narrowleaf sweet everlasting, is a perennial shrub native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation, and is often used in herbal preparations to calm the nervous system and alleviate anxiety. Aloysia gratissima var. angustifolia can be used in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or applied topically as a poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
